since_last: 34% of 100 AI names green; Powering AI leads +0.17%; AI bubble risk 50 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 34% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.91% · BTC +0.51% · Gold +0.65% · Nasdaq100 -1.32%. 34% of 100 AI names are green — broad selling. Powering AI is doing the heavy lifting at +0.17%.

cards.headline: Powering AI leads, Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Powering AI at +0.17%; weakest is Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical at -2.80%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: ISRG is the standout at -13.61%
cards.body: Leaders: LEU +6.21%, CSCO +2.68%, ZS +2.67%, DELL +2.27%, ARM +1.99%. Laggards: ISRG -13.61%, PUBM -7.01%, CRNC -6.71%, SPCX -5.63%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -5.63% at $123.73
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -5.63% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 50 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 50/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
